name: ElementCommands
summary: Tapir Add-On 'Element Commands' command group — 48 JSON-RPC commands.

methods.name: GetSelectedElements
methods.summary: Gets the list of the currently selected elements.

returns.doc: Returns an object with properties: elements.

methods.name: GetElementsByType
methods.signature: GetElementsByType(elementType: ElementType, filters?: ElementFilter[], databases?: Databases): ElementsWithExecutionResultsOrError
methods.summary: Returns the identifier of every element of the given type on the plan. It works for any type. Use the optional filter parameter for filtering.

returns.doc: Returns a `ElementsWithExecutionResultsOrError`.

methods.name: GetAllElements
methods.summary: Returns the identifier of all elements on the plan. Use the optional filter parameter for filtering.

returns.doc: Returns a `ElementsWithExecutionResultsOrError`.

methods.name: ChangeSelectionOfElements
methods.summary: Adds/removes a number of elements to/from the current selection.

returns.doc: Returns an object with properties: executionResultsOfAddToSelection, executionResultsOfRemoveFromSelection.

methods.name: FilterElements
methods.summary: Tests an elements by the given criterias.

returns.doc: Returns an object with properties: elements.

methods.name: GetDetailsOfElements
methods.summary: Gets the details of the given elements (geometry parameters etc).

returns.doc: Returns an object with properties: detailsOfElements.

methods.name: SetDetailsOfElements
methods.summary: Sets the details of the given elements (floor, layer, order etc).

params.name: elementsWithDetails
params.doc: The elements with parameters.

returns.doc: Returns an object with properties: executionResults.

methods.name: Get3DBoundingBoxes
methods.summary: Get the 3D bounding box of elements. The bounding box is calculated from the global origin in the 3D view. The output is the array of the bounding boxes respective to the input array of elements.

returns.doc: Returns an object with properties: boundingBoxes3D.

methods.name: GetSubelementsOfHierarchicalElements
methods.summary: Gets the subelements of the given hierarchical elements.

returns.doc: Returns an object with properties: subelements.

methods.name: GetConnectedElements
methods.summary: Gets connected elements of the given elements.

returns.doc: Returns a `ConnectedElementsOrError`.

methods.name: GetZoneBoundaries
methods.summary: Gets the boundaries of the given Zone (connected elements, neighbour zones, etc.).

returns.doc: Returns a `ZoneBoundariesOrError`.

methods.name: GetCollisions
methods.signature: GetCollisions(elementsGroup1: Elements, elementsGroup2: Elements, settings?: object): object
methods.summary: Detect collisions between the given two groups of elements.

returns.doc: Returns an object with properties: collisions.

methods.name: HighlightElements
methods.signature: HighlightElements(elements: Elements, highlightedColors: integer[][], wireframe3D?: boolean, nonHighlightedColor?: integer[]): ExecutionResult
methods.summary: Highlights the elements given in the elements array. In case of empty elements array removes all previously set highlights.

params.name: highlightedColors
params.doc: A list of colors to highlight elements.

params.name: wireframe3D
params.doc: Optional parameter. Switch non highlighted elements in the 3D window to wireframe.

params.name: nonHighlightedColor
params.doc: Optional parameter. Color of the non highlighted elements as an [r, g, b, a] array. Each component must be in the 0-255 range.

returns.doc: Returns a `ExecutionResult`.

methods.name: MoveElements
methods.summary: Moves elements with a given vector.

params.name: elementsWithMoveVectors
params.doc: The elements with move vector pairs.

returns.doc: Returns an object with properties: executionResults.

methods.name: DeleteElements
methods.summary: Deletes elements.

returns.doc: Returns a `ExecutionResult`.

methods.name: GetGDLParametersOfElements
methods.summary: Gets all the GDL parameters (name, type, value) of the given elements.

returns.doc: Returns an object with properties: gdlParametersOfElements.

methods.name: SetGDLParametersOfElements
methods.summary: Sets the given GDL parameters of the given elements.

params.name: elementsWithGDLParameters
params.doc: The elements with GDL parameters dictionary pairs.

returns.doc: Returns an object with properties: executionResults.

methods.name: GetClassificationsOfElements
methods.summary: Returns the classification of the given elements in the given classification systems. It works for subelements of hierarchal elements also.

returns.doc: Returns an object with properties: elementClassifications.

methods.name: SetClassificationsOfElements
methods.summary: Sets the classifications of elements. In order to set the classification of an element to unclassified, omit the classificationItemId field. It works for subelements of hierarchal elements also.

returns.doc: Returns an object with properties: executionResults.

methods.name: CreateColumns
methods.summary: Creates Column elements based on the given parameters.

params.name: columnsData
params.doc: Array of data to create Columns.

returns.doc: Returns an object with properties: elements.

methods.name: CreateWalls
methods.summary: Creates Wall elements based on the given parameters.

returns.doc: Returns an object with properties: elements.

methods.name: CreateBeams
methods.summary: Creates Beam elements based on the given parameters.

returns.doc: Returns an object with properties: elements.

methods.name: CreateSlabs
methods.summary: Creates Slab elements based on the given parameters.

params.name: slabsData
params.doc: Array of data to create Slabs.

returns.doc: Returns an object with properties: elements.

methods.name: CreateWindows
methods.summary: Creates Window elements in host walls based on the given parameters.

returns.doc: Returns an object with properties: elements.

methods.name: CreateDoors
methods.summary: Creates Door elements in host walls based on the given parameters.

returns.doc: Returns an object with properties: elements.

methods.name: CreateOpenings
methods.summary: Creates Opening elements in the given host elements.

returns.doc: Returns an object with properties: elements.

methods.name: CreateMorphs
methods.summary: Creates Morph elements from simple box definitions.

returns.doc: Returns an object with properties: elements.

methods.name: CreateRoofs
methods.summary: Creates multi-plane Roof elements based on footprint, level and roof profile data.

returns.doc: Returns an object with properties: elements.

methods.name: CreateAssociativeDimensions
methods.summary: Creates associative linear dimensions from explicit witness point references.

returns.doc: Returns an object with properties: elements.

methods.name: CreateAssociativeDimensionsOnSection
methods.summary: Creates associative linear dimensions on section elements using common wall, slab, beam, column and opening presets.

returns.doc: Returns an object with properties: elements.

methods.name: CreateWallThicknessDimensions
methods.summary: Creates associative wall thickness dimensions for the given walls.

returns.doc: Returns an object with properties: elements.

methods.name: CreateZones
methods.summary: Creates Zone elements based on the given parameters.

params.name: zonesData
params.doc: Array of data to create Zones.

returns.doc: Returns an object with properties: elements.

methods.name: CreatePolylines
methods.summary: Creates Polyline elements based on the given parameters.

params.name: polylinesData
params.doc: Array of data to create Polylines.

returns.doc: Returns an object with properties: elements.

methods.name: CreateObjects
methods.summary: Creates Object elements based on the given parameters.

params.name: objectsData
params.doc: Array of data to create Objects.

returns.doc: Returns an object with properties: elements.

methods.name: CreateMeshes
methods.summary: Creates Mesh elements based on the given parameters.

params.name: meshesData
params.doc: Array of data to create Meshes.

returns.doc: Returns an object with properties: elements.

methods.name: CreateLabels
methods.summary: Creates Label elements based on the given parameters.

params.name: labelsData
params.doc: Array of data to create Labels.

returns.doc: Returns an object with properties: elements.

methods.name: ModifyWalls
methods.summary: Modifies Wall elements based on the given parameters.

returns.doc: Returns an object with properties: executionResults.

methods.name: ModifyBeams
methods.summary: Modifies Beam elements based on the given parameters.

returns.doc: Returns an object with properties: executionResults.

methods.name: ModifySlabs
methods.summary: Modifies Slab elements based on the given parameters.

returns.doc: Returns an object with properties: executionResults.

methods.name: ModifyColumns
methods.summary: Modifies Column elements based on the given parameters.

returns.doc: Returns an object with properties: executionResults.

methods.name: ModifyWindows
methods.summary: Modifies Window elements based on the given parameters.

returns.doc: Returns an object with properties: executionResults.

methods.name: ModifyDoors
methods.summary: Modifies Door elements based on the given parameters.

returns.doc: Returns an object with properties: executionResults.

methods.name: ModifyMorphs
methods.summary: Modifies Morph elements based on the given parameters.

returns.doc: Returns an object with properties: executionResults.

methods.name: ModifyRoofs
methods.summary: Modifies multi-plane Roof elements based on the given parameters.

returns.doc: Returns an object with properties: executionResults.

methods.name: GetElementPreviewImage
methods.signature: GetElementPreviewImage(elementId: ElementId, imageType?: string, format?: string, width?: integer, height?: integer): object
methods.summary: Returns the preview image of the given element.

params.name: imageType
params.doc: The type of the preview image. Default is 3D.

params.name: format
params.doc: The image format. Default is png.

params.name: width
params.doc: The width of the preview image in pixels. Default is 128.

params.name: height
params.doc: The height of the preview image in pixels. Default is 128.

returns.doc: Returns an object with properties: previewImage.

methods.name: GetRoomImage
methods.signature: GetRoomImage(zoneId: ElementId, format?: string, width?: integer, height?: integer, offset?: number, scale?: number, backgroundColor?: ColorRGB): object
methods.summary: Returns the room image of the given zone.

params.name: format
params.doc: The image format. Default is png.

params.name: width
params.doc: The width of the preview image in pixels. Default is 256.

params.name: height
params.doc: The height of the preview image in pixels. Default is 256.

params.name: offset
params.doc: Offset of the clip polygon from the edge of the zone. Default is 0.001.

params.name: scale
params.doc: Scale of the view (e.g. 0.005 for 1:200). Default is 0.005.

params.name: backgroundColor
params.doc: Background color of the generated image. Default is white (1.0, 1.0, 1.0).

returns.doc: Returns an object with properties: roomImage.

methods.name: SetElementNotificationClient
methods.signature: SetElementNotificationClient(host?: string, port: integer, notifyOnNewElement?: boolean, notifyOnModificationOfAnElement?: boolean, notifyOnReservationChanges?: boolean): ExecutionResult
methods.summary: Sets up a new notification client to receive element events.

params.name: host
params.doc: The host address of the notification client. If not provided, localhost is used.

params.name: port
params.doc: The port number of the notification client.

params.name: notifyOnNewElement
params.doc: Notify on creation of a new element. Optional parameter, by default true.

params.name: notifyOnModificationOfAnElement
params.doc: Notify on modification/deletion of an element. Optional parameter, by default true.

params.name: notifyOnReservationChanges
params.doc: Notify on reservation changes of an element. Optional parameter, by default true.

returns.doc: Returns a `ExecutionResult`.

methods.name: RemoveElementNotificationClient
methods.summary: Removes an element notification client.

params.name: host
params.doc: The host address of the notification client. If not provided, localhost is used.

params.name: port
params.doc: The port number of the notification client.

returns.doc: Returns a `ExecutionResult`.
